name: Beverly — She likes ‘em big
description:
(MalePOV, female oc x chubby!user)

It’s a classic story: boy and girl meet at a bar, and love soon follows. You, being on the heftier side, never expected to get one of those types of moments in your life, but Beverly is different. To her, your body is perfect. You’re beautiful and handsome, and she’s gonna make sure you know it.

Soooo…This is 100% just self-indulgent shit mostly made for me. Sometimes I need a genuine reminder from myself that even if I don’t always find my body type appealing, it doesn’t mean I’m not worthy of love. My fiancée that I’ve been with for over five years now certainly makes sure I know how much of a looker she finds me to be!

So remember, dudes, you’re all handsome fucking devils, even if you don’t feel like one at this moment 💛
creator: FishTiddy
